title: Good and Bad Things about TV
prompt: Some people think TV is good, others think it is bad. Write about both sides and give your opinion. (~150 words)
content:
Many people think TV is good. Other people think TV is bad. I want to write about this topic.

TV is a good thing. We can see news on TV. We can learn new things from TV. It is very informative. TV programs are also fun. We can watch movie and show. It is a good way to relax. I think TV is good for learn.

But TV is also have bad side. Some show is violent. It is bad for children. Watching too much TV is waste of time. We do not do other thing. It is not good for health. Some people think TV is very bad.

I think TV can be good or bad. It depend on how we use it. We should watch good program. We should not watch too much. I think TV is a good invention if we use it careful.
